mapper.update: MERGE INTO SNS_ACCESS_HISTORY a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.menu_idx = #{menu_idx} AND a.access_date = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd')) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.twitter = a.twitter+1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, menu_idx, access_date, twitter, facebook, kakaostory ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{menu_idx}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMdd'), 1, 0, 0 )

MERGE INTO SNS_ACCESS_HISTORY a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.menu_idx = #{menu_idx} AND a.access_date = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd')) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.facebook = a.facebook+1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, menu_idx, access_date, twitter, facebook, kakaostory ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{menu_idx}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMdd'), 0, 1, 0 )

MERGE INTO SNS_ACCESS_HISTORY a USING dual ON (a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.menu_idx = #{menu_idx} AND a.access_date = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd')) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.kakaostory = a.kakaostory+1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( homepage_id, menu_idx, access_date, twitter, facebook, kakaostory ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{menu_idx}, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMdd'), 0, 0, 1 )
